description: A shoe made for tennis players, the fila Victory is as high on style as on function. Made to last, these shoes enhance performance on the court. Wear them with shorts or tracks when battling it out, or with jeans for off-the-court casual awesomeness. Upper Synthetic upper for longer shoe life Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Well padded tongue and collar for in-step comfort Rubber heel counter embedded into the upper for enhanced shoe durability Mesh around the collar for better breathability Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for better shock absorption Soft cushy footbed for extra comfort Mesh inner for better breathability Outsole TPR outsole for extra durability Pivot point for easy 180 degree movement of the forefoot Herringbone pattern for better traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Wash careDo not machine washWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to clear off dust Do not store in direct sunlight
